# FCP Sports

> Elite basketball training facility in Fort Walton Beach, Florida serving the Emerald Coast — Destin, Niceville, Navarre, Crestview, Pensacola, Panama City.

FCP Sports is a dedicated 14,000 sq ft indoor basketball facility offering camps, leagues, skills training, private lessons, and open gym for athletes ages 5-18. Located at 33 Jet Drive NW, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548, we serve military families from Eglin AFB and Hurlburt Field with $20 military discounts on all programs. Program advised by NBA veteran Kenny Anderson (14 seasons, 2nd overall pick 1991).

## Programs

- [Basketball Camps](https://fcpsports.org/camps/): Summer day camps ($149/week AM or PM), Summer Prep Week, Little Hoopers Mini ($79 K-2), Spring Break Camp, Holiday Camp
- [Saturday League](https://fcpsports.org/youth-league/): Three 2026 sessions, ages 5+, $149/session
- [Sunday MS League](https://fcpsports.org/services/basketball-league/): i9-style practice+game same day, grades 5-8, $179/8 weeks
- [Skills Training](https://fcpsports.org/services/basketball-training/): $149/month unlimited, Mon-Thu afternoons
- [Private Lessons](https://fcpsports.org/services/basketball-lessons/): 1-on-1 coaching from $50/session
- [Homeschool PE](https://fcpsports.org/services/homeschool-pe/): $99/month, Tue/Thu mornings, grades K-8
- [Open Gym](https://fcpsports.org/services/open-gym/): Drop-in $10, HS evenings
- [Gym Rental](https://fcpsports.org/services/gym-rental/): Full court rental for teams and events

## Key Facts

- Location: 33 Jet Drive NW, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548
- Phone: 850.961.2323
- Email: info@fcpsports.org
- Ages: 5-18 plus adult men's league
- Facility: 14,000 sq ft dedicated basketball gym, full regulation court, climate-controlled
- Military discount: $20 off all programs (Eglin AFB, Hurlburt Field, DoD)
- Sibling discount: $20 off each additional child, stacks with military

## Pricing

- Summer Day Camp: $149/week (AM or PM, register for both = $298)
- Little Hoopers Mini: $79 (K-2, Tue-Thu half-day)
- Spring Break Camp: $129
- Holiday Camp: $79
- Saturday League: $149/session
- Sunday MS League: $179/8 weeks
- Winter MS League: $199/season (Jan–Mar)
- Skills Training: $149/month unlimited or $25 drop-in
- Private Lessons: from $50/session
- Homeschool PE: $99/month

## Service Area

Fort Walton Beach, Destin, Niceville, Navarre, Crestview, Pensacola, Panama City — the entire Florida Panhandle Emerald Coast region.
